← All IRC handicap examples

IRC — series tie broken by RRS A8.1/A8.2 on the handicap path

The A8 tie-break is shared by scratch and handicap scoring. This fixture exercises it through the corrected-time path (calculateHandicapStandings). All boats carry TCC 1.0, so corrected time equals elapsed time and finishing order is the race order. Alice and Bob both net 5 with one discard; their non-discarded scores are identical ([2, 3] each), so A8.1 cannot separate them (Alice's discard is a DNC, Bob's is a 4th — both excluded). A8.2 then counts back from the last race: race 3 has Alice 3rd and Bob 4th, so Alice ranks ahead. This is the handicap mirror of scratch fixture 14.

Scoring system: IRC 
4 boats, N+1 = 5 (DNC). One discard. TCC 1.0 throughout → CT = ET.

Alice: DNC, 2nd, 3rd → {5,2,3} discard 5 → net 5, kept best-to-worst [2, 3]
Bob:   2nd, 3rd, 4th → {2,3,4} discard 4 → net 5, kept best-to-worst [2, 3]
Carol: 1st, 1st, 1st → net 2 (wins outright)
David: DNC, 4th, 2nd → {5,4,2} discard 5 → net 6 (last)

  A8.1 — kept [2,3] vs [2,3] → identical, cannot separate
  A8.2 — last race (race 3): Alice=3, Bob=4 → Alice wins
    Alice and David DNC; Carol 1st (30 min), Bob 2nd (31 min)

Race 1

Gun time: 12:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Carol 303 1.000 12:30:00 30m 00s 1.0000 30m 00s 1
2 Bob 202 1.000 12:31:00 31m 00s 1.0000 31m 00s 2
— Alice 101 1.000 DNC — 1.0000 — 5
— David 404 1.000 DNC — 1.0000 — 5

Race 2

Gun time: 12:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Carol 303 1.000 12:30:00 30m 00s 1.0000 30m 00s 1
2 Alice 101 1.000 12:31:00 31m 00s 1.0000 31m 00s 2
3 Bob 202 1.000 12:32:00 32m 00s 1.0000 32m 00s 3
4 David 404 1.000 12:33:00 33m 00s 1.0000 33m 00s 4

Race 3

Gun time: 12:00:00
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Carol 303 1.000 12:30:00 30m 00s 1.0000 30m 00s 1
2 David 404 1.000 12:31:00 31m 00s 1.0000 31m 00s 2
3 Alice 101 1.000 12:32:00 32m 00s 1.0000 32m 00s 3
4 Bob 202 1.000 12:33:00 33m 00s 1.0000 33m 00s 4

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1R2R3TotalNet
1 Carol 303 111 3 2
2 Alice 101 DNC23 10 5
3 Bob 202 234 9 5
4 David 404 DNC42 11 6
sailscoring.ie
